svg.title: How PDK Modules Interface With the Base PDK
svg.desc: Infographic showing the sibling module layout, dynamic discovery by Xschem and KLayout, and runtime dependency on the base SG13G2 technology library.
svg.text: How PDK Modules Interface With the Base PDK
Current implementation in this repository: dynamic discovery, shared SG13G2 technology, and tool-specific registration
